channel.title: Nail Art Ideas from vivarecipesinspo.github.io/nailart
channel.description: A collection of stunning nail art ideas and inspiration.

item.title: Cute Nails Spring Colors French
item.description: Getting ready for your next getaway? Make sure your hands look the part with this vibrant Nails Spring Colors French style. Check our blog for travel-friendly nail tips! #vacationnails #summerstyle #nailinspo #holidayglam #nails
